message:
Fix path traversal vulnerabilities and polish UI

- Add path traversal guards to results, screenshots, video, and static
  file serving routes
- Extract shared StatusBadge and formatDuration to shared.tsx
- Add parent field to CardSummary API response for fanout indentation
- Fix useRunStream: add try/catch on JSON.parse, onerror handler,
  proper VetResult typing
- Add path traversal regression tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
